name: SellYourAuto.ca
tagline: Sell Your Car for the Best Price.
description: Canada's premier destination for selling your vehicle with speed, ease, and confidence.

about.heading:
Canada's Smarter Way
To Sell Your Car.
about.body1: We built SellYourAuto.ca because selling a car in Canada shouldn't mean weeks of listings, sketchy strangers, or lowball dealership trade-ins. Our lightning-fast appraisal system puts a real, guaranteed offer in your hands within minutes.
about.body2: From Halifax to Vancouver, we've helped thousands of Canadians get top dollar for their vehicles — with zero stress, zero hidden fees, and zero games. Fill out the form, get your offer, and we'll handle the rest.

pillars.title: Transparent Pricing
pillars.desc: Real Canadian market data, honest numbers — no bait and switch.

pillars.title: Lightning Fast
pillars.desc: Appraisal in minutes. Free pickup scheduled within 48 hours.

pillars.title: Zero Fees Ever
pillars.desc: We pay you. No commissions, no listing fees, no surprises.

howItWorks.heading:
Three Simple Steps
To Your Best Offer.

steps.title: Describe Your Vehicle
steps.desc: Fill out our smart form with your car's year, make, model, mileage, and condition. Upload a few photos to maximize your offer — takes about 2 minutes.

steps.title: Receive Your Offer
steps.desc: Our appraisal engine analyzes real-time Canadian market data and delivers a guaranteed offer — typically within minutes of submission. No obligation to accept.

steps.title: Get Paid, We Pick Up
steps.desc: Accept your offer, pick a time that works for you, and we come to you — anywhere in Canada. Payment is issued on the spot via e-transfer. Done!

footer.tagline: Canada's smarter way to sell your car.
footer.disclaimer: SellYourAuto.ca operates coast to coast across Canada.
